generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A large mystical wooden wheel constructed from woven vines and stones, suspended between two huge forest trees. Various forest creatures (cricket, rat, hare, bird) are depicted in the quadrants representing seasons. An anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat mask sits at the very center, eyes closed in meditation of the cosmic cycle.
generation.narrative: A large mystical wooden wheel constructed from woven vines and stones, suspended between two huge forest trees. Various forest creatures (cricket, rat, hare, bird) are depicted in the quadrants representing seasons. An anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat mask sits at the very center, eyes closed in meditation of the cosmic cycle.

meanings.upright: Cycles of change, fate, turning points, seasons, and the interconnectedness of all life.
meanings.reversed: Bad luck, negative external forces, broken cycles, or ecological collapse.

ecology.risk_theme: climate shifts and the disruption of natural seasonal prey cycles
ecology.mapping_note: The Wheel of Fortune symbolizes the grand cosmic and ecological cycle—the changing seasons, the food web, and the delicate fate of the leopard cat intertwined with all forest creatures.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：the grand ecological cycle 。 生存威脅：climate shifts and the disruption of natural seasonal prey cycles 。 牌義關聯：The Wheel of Fortune symbolizes the grand cosmic and ecological cycle—the changing seasons, the food web, and the delicate fate of the leopard cat intertwined with all forest creatures. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：all life stages

website.excerpt: The great wheel turns, weaving the fate of the leopard cat into the eternal, changing cycles of the forest ecosystem.
website.seo_description: The Wheel of Fortune tarot card reimagined as the grand ecological cycle and seasonal changes in the forest.

meaning.zh: 命運的循環、改變、轉捩點、季節交替，以及所有生命相互交織的命運。
meaning.en: Cycles of change, fate, turning points, seasons, and the interconnectedness of all life.
